headline: Three Gorges new channel opens with 12-minute ceremony as Xi's efficiency drive takes hold
headline_zh: 三峡新通道12分钟开工亮相，效率导向落实处
narrative: The day's most important structural signal is the Party's intensified push for operational efficiency and anti-formalism, epitomized by the 12-minute groundbreaking for the 77.2 billion Yuan Three Gorges new channel. This aligns with Xi Jinping's repeated calls to cut red tape and bureaucratic waste. Meanwhile, trade data continues to surprise on the upside, with foreign trade exceeding 4 trillion Yuan for three straight months, but anti-dumping actions and new private fund regulations indicate a more cautious approach to external dependencies and financial risks. Geopolitically, the Taiwan Affairs Office presser and Iran's nuclear stance remain in focus but no major escalation.
narrative_zh: 今日最显著的结构性信号是党对务实高效、反对形式主义的持续强调，以三峡水运新通道工程12分钟的简短开工仪式为典型。这与习近平多次要求精简流程、杜绝浪费的指示一脉相承。同时，外贸数据连续三个月超4万亿元表现出韧性，但反倾销措施和私募基金监管新规显示对外依赖和金融风险正被更审慎地管控。台海和伊朗核问题暂无重大升级，需持续关注。
market_snapshot: SSE Composite 4031.51 ▲1.12% · Shenzhen Component 14963.4 ▲0.75% · ChiNext 3830.353 ▲0.50% · USD/CNY 6.7621 ▼0.19% · USD/CNH 6.76 ▼0.04%
